market_archetypes.behavior: Reacts aggressively to negative news headlines. Prioritizes capital preservation over long-term gains. Likely to sell if price drops more than 3% in a single round.
Ignores short-term volatility. Focuses on 'Hard Data' like P/E ratios. Sees price drops as 'Buying Opportunities' rather than threats.
Large-scale institutional player. Their moves create 'Liquidity Events.' Other agents tend to follow their lead (The Herding Effect).
Extremely stubborn. Will not sell regardless of news sentiment or price drops. Acts as a price floor during crashes.
